text:
Created attachment 176823
update patch

pick up Github commit:
https://github.com/dovecot/core/commit/b284962364068d5e9d60b8b1e98ba61b4b6593ec

lib-http: client: Fixed assert failure occurring when server
 returns error status early while client is still sending blocking payload.

Note: patches re-genned with make makepatch
